title: Tricky Trials
description: An adventurous modpack awaits, exploring the trial chambers and the new update! What will you build?
body:
Welcome to the modpack made specially for the new 1.21 update "Tricky Trials!" This java modpack includes all the 1.21 update with all of the new Minecraft vanilla blocks, but includes mods for an even better experience. We also minimized the amount of mods so your computer can handle it! Try it out now! 

BELOW: MODS, TEXTURE PACKS, SHADERS

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4e03edbee0bbb82b85a8c8c4344b3eec2b0c15a.webp)

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.
